title: Points of Light
excerpt: 10 years of research, 14 million data points, 14 laser projectors — the Grote Kerk as a real-time light environment.
description:
Ten years of research. 14 million data points. 14 laser projectors.

What started a decade ago as a research project between Jaco Schilp and Jan Willem Campmans has finally pushed through the technical ceiling, turning the historic Grote Kerk in Den Haag into a real-time data environment. Using TouchDesigner's POP operators, the work runs a full LiDAR 3D scan of the cathedral — 14 million particles calibrated in real time. No pre-renders, no loops: raw architecture translated into light.

Visitors experience the intersection of history and high-performance code — presented in January 2025 in 20-minute cycles, free entry.
credits: Video animations & custom calibration: Studio Schilp (TouchDesigner). Digital light animations: Sem Schreuder (Unreal Engine). Sound: Metz. Projectors sponsored by Epson. Hosted at Grote Kerk Den Haag / the Greanery. Film: Jokko Voogt.
